title: Open Directory Listing on Web Server — /assets/
description: Directory listing is enabled at https://somaiya.com/assets/ on the web server. Files in this directory are publicly browsable. Sample files: apps/, bootstrap-submenu.min.js, captcha/, ckeditor/, ckeditor_edu/.
action: Disable directory listing in your web server configuration (Apache: Options -Indexes; Nginx: remove autoindex on). Audit the directory for sensitive files.

title: Open Directory Listing on Subdomain — /assets/
description: Directory listing is enabled at https://www.somaiya.com/assets/. Files in this path are publicly browsable. Sample files: apps/, bootstrap-submenu.min.js, captcha/, ckeditor/, ckeditor_edu/.
action: Disable directory listing in your web server config. Audit the exposed path for credentials, backups, or config files.
